name: VPC has no Route 53 DNS resolver with logging enabled
description: VPC does not have a Route 53 Resolver query logging configuration, limiting visibility into DNS queries for threat detection and incident response
remediation: 1. Create a Route 53 Resolver query log configuration. 2. Associate it with the VPC. 3. Configure log destination (CloudWatch Logs, S3, or Kinesis). 4. Set up alerts for suspicious DNS queries.
